description: Analyze the tandem repeat structure of PGG domains - compare the internal repeat unit and assess whether these form a multi-TM pore-like structure
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

# The key observation: PGG domain proteins show variable numbers of TM helices
# that are always multiples or near-multiples of the PGG domain count

proteins = {
    'A0A804UIX9 (Maize)': {'length': 375, 'PGG': 2, 'TM': 6, 'Ank': False},
    'A0A0P0WVF8 (Rice)': {'length': 286, 'PGG': 2, 'TM': 6, 'Ank': False},
    'Q2R8Q6 (Rice)': {'length': 275, 'PGG': 1, 'TM': 6, 'Ank': False},
    'A0A804LML3 (Maize)': {'length': 429, 'PGG': 2, 'TM': 6, 'Ank': False},
    'A0A0P0WVA6 (Rice, SF432)': {'length': 276, 'PGG': 1, 'TM': 4, 'Ank': False},
    'A0A0P0WVH3 (Rice, 5×PGG)': {'length': 877, 'PGG': 5, 'TM': 16, 'Ank': False},
    'ACD6/Q8LPS2 (Arabidopsis)': {'length': 670, 'PGG': 1, 'TM': 6, 'Ank': True},
    'ITN1/Q9C7A2 (Arabidopsis)': {'length': 670, 'PGG': 1, 'TM': 6, 'Ank': True},
}

print("=== PGG Domain Architecture Survey ===")
print(f"{'Protein':<35} {'Length':>6} {'PGG':>4} {'TM':>4} {'Ank':>5} {'TM/PGG':>8}")
print("-" * 70)
for name, info in proteins.items():
    ratio = info['TM'] / info['PGG'] if info['PGG'] > 0 else 'N/A'
    print(f"{name:<35} {info['length']:>6} {info['PGG']:>4} {info['TM']:>4} {'Yes' if info['Ank'] else 'No':>5} {ratio:>8.1f}")

print("\n=== Key Observation ===")
print("TM/PGG ratio is approximately 3:1 in most proteins")
print("  - 2 PGG + 6 TM → 3 TM per PGG domain")
print("  - 1 PGG + 6 TM → 6 TM per PGG (but only 1 PGG annotated; may have degenerate second)")
print("  - 5 PGG + 16 TM → 3.2 TM per PGG domain")
print("\nThis suggests a fundamental repeat unit of: PGG domain + ~3 TM helices")
print("A0A804UIX9 has 2 such units → 2×(PGG + 3TM) = 6 TM total")

# Create a topology diagram
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(12, 7))

# Draw membrane
ax.axhspan(-0.5, 0.5, color='#FFE0B2', alpha=0.5)
ax.text(7, 0, 'MEMBRANE', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=14, color='orange', fontweight='bold', alpha=0.5)

# TM helices positions (x-coordinates)
tm_x = [1, 2.5, 4, 6, 7.5, 9]
tm_labels = ['TM1\n(54-73)', 'TM2\n(102-123)', 'TM3\n(135-154)', 'TM4\n(166-189)', 'TM5\n(222-239)', 'TM6\n(269-290)']

# Draw TM helices
for i, (x, label) in enumerate(zip(tm_x, tm_labels)):
    color = '#FF5722' if i < 3 else '#E91E63'
    rect = plt.Rectangle((x-0.3, -0.5), 0.6, 1, color=color, alpha=0.8, ec='black', lw=1)
    ax.add_patch(rect)
    ax.text(x, -0.8, label, ha='center', va='top', fontsize=7)

# Draw loops (extracellular/luminal)
# PGG1 loop between TM1 and TM2
ax.annotate('', xy=(2.5, 0.5), xytext=(1, 0.5),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='-', color='blue', lw=2, connectionstyle='arc3,rad=0.5'))
ax.text(1.75, 1.7, 'PGG domain 1\n(LPGG motif)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9, 
        color='blue', fontweight='bold',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='lightblue', alpha=0.7))

# PGG2 loop between TM5 and TM6
ax.annotate('', xy=(9, 0.5), xytext=(7.5, 0.5),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='-', color='blue', lw=2, connectionstyle='arc3,rad=0.5'))
ax.text(8.25, 1.7, 'PGG domain 2\n(PPGG motif)', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9,
        color='blue', fontweight='bold',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='lightblue', alpha=0.7))

# N-terminus (cytoplasmic)
ax.annotate('N-term\n(disordered,\ncytoplasmic)', xy=(1, -0.5), xytext=(-0.5, -2),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='gray'), fontsize=8, ha='center',
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightyellow', alpha=0.7))

# C-terminus
ax.annotate('C-term\n(basic, disordered,\n3 Cys, PPGG motif)', xy=(9, -0.5), xytext=(10.5, -2),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='gray'), fontsize=8, ha='center',
            bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightyellow', alpha=0.7))

# Labels
ax.text(-1, 1.5, 'EXTRACELLULAR\n/ LUMINAL', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, color='green')
ax.text(-1, -1.5, 'CYTOPLASMIC', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, color='purple')

# Repeat unit brackets
ax.annotate('', xy=(0.5, -2.8), xytext=(4.5, -2.8),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='<->', color='red', lw=2))
ax.text(2.5, -3.1, 'Repeat Unit 1', ha='center', fontsize=9, color='red', fontweight='bold')

ax.annotate('', xy=(5.5, -2.8), xytext=(9.5, -2.8),
            arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='<->', color='red', lw=2))
ax.text(7.5, -3.1, 'Repeat Unit 2', ha='center', fontsize=9, color='red', fontweight='bold')

ax.set_xlim(-2, 12)
ax.set_ylim(-3.5, 3)
ax.set_aspect('equal')
ax.set_title('Proposed Membrane Topology of A0A804UIX9\n(6-TM, 2×PGG repeat unit architecture)', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold')
ax.axis('off')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('topology_model.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Topology model saved.")
